since_last: 67% of 89 AI names green; Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical leads +1.56%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 67% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +1.18% · BTC -1.21% · Gold +0.63% · Nasdaq100 +2.25%. 67% of 89 AI names are green — a broad bid. Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical is doing the heavy lifting at +1.56%.

cards.headline: Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at +1.56%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -0.20%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: AVAV is the standout at +19.78%
cards.body: Leaders: AVAV +19.78%, CEVA +6.71%, PWR +2.77%, SMCI +2.59%, AMAT +2.28%. Laggards: DLR -4.24%, TTD -1.93%, HON -1.81%, SAP -1.08%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.60% at $163.21
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.60% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
